title: Serial Dilution of Nucleofected iPSC Pools
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"874k8","text":"This protocol is part of the Genomic Editing: iPSC collection. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":29,"length":32}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"3DD64E10340011E982F40B4FEAEC5B76","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/genomic-editing-ipsc-yayfsfw/protocols"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"beamj","text":"Please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for information about hazards, and to obtain advice on safety precautions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Coat 3 wells of a 6 well plate with 1 mL Matrigel (supplemented with RGD fragment)
Aspirate media from cells in culture.
Wash with 1 mL - 2 mL PBS per well.

Incubate at 37 °C for 00:10:00 to achieve single cells. Individual donor lines exhibit variable sensitivity to accutase-mediated dissociation. Monitor cells regularly to identify when cells achieve single cells.
Collect cells in 5 mL DMEM/F12 and transfer to a 15mL conical tube.
Resuspend cells in mTesR1 supplemented with 5 uM Rock Inhibitor.
Plate several dilutions of cells over the three wells (typically 25 μl, 50 μl and 75 μl in 2 mL of mTesR1).
Freeze down the remaining cells by adding an equal volume of 2x iPSC Freezing Media (20% DMSO in FBS).
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
